task_completion.description: Configure Stellarium to New York City and the specific date/time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium Location window shows New York City (or coordinates ~40.71 N, 74.00 W) and the Date/Time window shows 2025-03-14 at 06:58 UTC.

task_completion.description: Locate and center the Moon in the view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Moon is visible, selected (usually indicated by a reticle or information text in the corner), and centered in the Stellarium sky view.

task_completion.description: Enable Azimuthal Grid, Constellation Lines, Cardinal Points, and disable Atmosphere.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sky view displays circular Azimuthal Grid lines, Constellation stick-figure lines, and Cardinal Point letters (N, E, S, W). The sky background must be dark (Atmosphere disabled), and the atmosphere toggle icon in the bottom toolbar should be unhighlighted/off.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the simulation to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window shows an image file inside the `/home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/` directory, or a Stellarium on-screen notification confirms a screenshot was saved.

task_completion.description: Create a text file with the event details on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the file `eclipse_event_guide.txt` located at `~/Desktop/` containing the location (New York City), date (March 14, 2025), and target (Total Lunar Eclipse / Moon).
The Stellarium Configuration window (Main tab) is open showing the 'Save settings' button being clicked, or an on-screen notification confirms settings were saved.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Stellarium GUI to configure the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Stellarium application open and being interacted with (menus, toolbars, dialogs), rather than just terminal commands editing the `config.ini` file.

integrity.description: Verify the screenshot was generated by Stellarium.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot file in the Pictures directory should match the standard Stellarium output format (e.g., `stellarium-000.png`) and visually match the configured scene, not a downloaded image from a web browser.

integrity.description: Verify the text file was created by the agent.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a text editor (like gedit, nano) or terminal echo commands being used to write the specific event details into `eclipse_event_guide.txt`.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Location: New York City (40.71 N, 74.00 W). Time: 2025-03-14 06:58 UTC. Required active flags: Azimuthal Grid (true), Constellation Lines (true), Cardinal Points (true). Required inactive flags: Atmosphere (false). Guide path: /home/ga/Desktop/eclipse_event_guide.txt. Screenshot directory: /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium.
